name: AI DJ — Soft Morning
description: Soft, moody bedroom-pop for the sleepy bus ride to work. The gentlest end of the Billie / Clairo / girl in red neighborhood — hushed vocals, slow drift, nothing that jolts you awake. Custom curation by the AI DJ.
tracks: girl in red - we fell in love in october
Billie Eilish - when the party's over
Faye Webster - In a Good Way
Gracie Abrams - I miss you, I'm sorry
Men I Trust - Show Me How
Lord Huron - The Night We Met
Alec Benjamin - Let Me Down Slowly
